<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a production-ready React + Vite PWA for private family event sharing. Use Firebase Auth, Firestore, and Storage. Use functional components, custom hooks, and TailwindCSS. All code should be clean, modern, and commented. Admin role logic is managed via Firestore user document (`role: 'admin'`).
